reuse_metadata.native_query_output_buffer_reuse_note: prepared_buffers mode reuses Python-owned ctypes query/output buffers; OptiX still uploads query segments per run and no native device buffer reuse is claimed

warmup_protocol.minimum_default: 7 repeats with 2 warmup rows for local evidence
warmup_protocol.rule: drop the first warmup_count rows; report medians over remaining tail rows
